$schema_note: Single source of truth for cross-UC PoC assumptions (JNPA Digital Twin). Consumed by UC-3 services via jnpa_shared.assumptions.load_assumptions() and by the dashboard via GET /api/assumptions; UC-2 reads the same file. Prose rationale lives in docs/ASSUMPTIONS.md. Production values come from the JNPA baseline study (jnport.gov.in Reports / NLDS), post-award.
data_posture: All production APIs are JNPA-facilitated, post-award; each is replaced by a schema-faithful simulator in the PoC (mock -> live is a config change).

port.name: Jawaharlal Nehru Port Authority (JNPA)
port.annual_throughput_teu_note: Nominal PoC planning figure; production value from JNPA published statistics.

road.capacity_note: Standard urban-arterial per-lane saturation flow assumption; not a JNPA survey value.

vehicles.trucking_app_source: bid §8.5.1 install base; 20k-device simulator, hot-scalable to 30k+

vessel.dpd_note: Vessel/berth figures are nominal PoC planning assumptions; the only wired cross-twin signal is the cargo.dpd_release spike (UC-II -> UC-III).

kpi_targets.source: shared/jnpa_shared/kpi.py KPI_TARGETS (authoritative; mirrored here for cross-UC/read-only consumers)
